violations.description: Manual cleaning and sanitizing requirements. — --A sink with a least three compartments was not provided for manual cleaning, rinsing, and sanitizing of equipment/utensils. A three compartment sink was not available to wash dishes. Dishes were being washed in the hand sink due to the dishwasher not working.

Mechanical cleaning and sanitizing requirements. — --Surface of equipment/utensil did not reach minimum temperature of 160F during hot water sanitize rinse of warewash machine. The dishwasher was not working.--Warewash machine was not maintained and/or operated as required. The dishwasher was not working at the time of inspection. There is not a three compartment sink available to wash dishes.
Handwashing lavatories. — --Handwashing lavatory was used for purpose other than handwashing. Dishes were being washed in the hand sink.
Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Nonfood contact surface was not cleaned as frequently as required. The tops of the beverage and hot holding equipment need to be cleaned.
Single-service and single-use articles. — --Single-service item was not stored in a proper location to be protected from contamination. A box of straws was stored on the floor in the stockroom.
Cleaning frequency, maintained clean (1 pt deducted)
